vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409
Vehicle context: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach
Application variant: collaborative robot mode, compliant joints, collision absorption, rounded edges
Suggested material: Al 7075 + steel + composite, process: CNC + LPBF

verify.rule: All required fields are present and valid.
Mass budget is within expected range.
All P0 internal_feature_targets are represented in part_tree/geometry_ops.
All interfaces have reciprocal definitions in adjacent subsystems.
Critical joints have visible locking and preload evidence.
Boundary conditions are defined for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: Potential over-torque during installation of fasteners could damage the mounting flange.
risk.mit: Implement torque control during assembly to prevent over-torque.

risk.desc: Cable routing through the service access hatch may cause strain on the harness.
risk.mit: Design strain relief features for cable exits and ensure proper routing.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance around the harmonic drive may lead to overheating.
risk.mit: Increase clearance around the harmonic drive to improve airflow.

risk.desc: The heat sink may not dissipate heat effectively if not properly attached.
risk.mit: Ensure proper thermal interface material and secure attachment of the heat sink.

risk.desc: The service access hatch may not provide sufficient access for maintenance.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the service access hatch to improve accessibility.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

physics_paths.path: Torque from payload transmitted to mounting flange via harmonic drive
Electrical signals from control electronics to drive electronics
Heat dissipation from drive electronics to environment via heat sink
Rotary motion of the base joint transmitted to mounting flange
Access for maintenance and inspection

integration_opportunities: Base Joint (J1) can be integrated with the mounting flange to ensure proper alignment and torque transmission.
Cable entry grommet allows for clean and protected cable routing.
Service access hatch provides easy access for maintenance and inspection.

risk.desc: The encoder cover may not provide sufficient protection against environmental contaminants due to the cable exit strain relief design.
risk.mit: Review and potentially redesign the cable exit strain relief to ensure it meets the IP54 environmental sealing requirements.

risk.desc: The encoder pocket may not be robust enough to withstand the cyclic loading from the joint's movement.
risk.mit: Conduct a fatigue analysis and reinforce the encoder pocket if necessary.

risk.desc: The inspection labels may become obscured over time due to wear and tear.
risk.mit: Use durable materials and a design that minimizes wear on the inspection labels.

risk.desc: The encoder bearing seat may not provide adequate preload, potentially leading to loose fit and reduced performance.
risk.mit: Ensure that the encoder bearing seat design includes a locking feature or preload mechanism.

risk.desc: The encoder index marks may not be visible under certain lighting conditions.
risk.mit: Enhance the visibility of the encoder index marks with reflective or contrasting materials.
